title: Set up S3 session storage bucket with proper structure
description: Create S3 bucket for session data on hackathon AWS account (us-east-1). Structure: sessions/<session-id>/ with subfolders per DATA-CONTRACT.md. Add lifecycle policy: session data expires after 90 days. Add CORS for extension upload. Create IAM policy with least-privilege for each workstream (extension writes clicks/screenshots, audio writes audio/transcript, analysis writes output/). Use CloudFormation.

substeps.title: Write CloudFormation template (bucket, lifecycle, CORS, IAM roles)
substeps.notes: infra/s3-session-storage.yaml — passes cfn-lint validation. Bucket, lifecycle (90 days), CORS (chrome-extension://*), 4 IAM policies + roles (extension, audio, analysis, app).

substeps.title: Write test script for the 5 task tests
substeps.notes: infra/test-s3-setup.sh — runs all 5 verification tests against deployed stack.

substeps.title: Deploy stack to hackathon account and run tests
substeps.notes: EC2 worker instance role (156805546859) does not have cloudformation permissions and is not the hackathon account (752266476357). Deployment must be done by Joel from a machine with hackathon profile credentials: cd boothapp && aws --profile hackathon cloudformation deploy --stack-name boothapp-sessions --template-file infra/s3-session-storage.yaml --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM. Then run: AWS_PROFILE=hackathon bash infra/test-s3-setup.sh

tests: Upload a test file to sessions/test-123/clicks/test.json -> succeeds
Lifecycle policy configured -> verify with aws s3api get-bucket-lifecycle
CORS allows PUT from chrome-extension:// origin
IAM policy: extension role can write clicks/ but not output/
IAM policy: analysis role can write output/ but not clicks/
notes: Marked complete - code verified in repo on main branch
